title: The Secret Space Program & Dark Fleet
summary: The off-world empire above the public world — jumpgates, Mars caretakers, cyborg factories, and the fleets of the Reichs.
markdown:
The **Secret Space Program** (SSP) is the archive's hidden second civilization — an off-world
military-industrial order running above the public one. Its skeleton, per the interview
sessions: **jumpgate** transit between Earth, Moon, Mars, and Jupiter; trade routes to
Antarctic and Martian installations exchanging "the products of the secret space program" —
including, the sessions say flatly, **cyborg factories**; and a public shadow in the new Space
Force, described as "the ancestor… mirroring the SSP Space Force."

The sessions name its fleets. The "UFO fleet," the August 2020 material says, is **Solar
Warden** — *"they go by a different name, now"* — cast as the Navy's off-world armada, once
*"controlled by the Rothschilds"* and later, in the record's account, passing to other hands;
against it stands **Nacht Waffen**, named as the *"(Nazi Secret Space Program)"* fleet — the
Reichs' armada beside the Alliance's. Mars belongs to the program: the February 2020 material
names the **Fourth Reich as the "caretakers, or keepers"** of the Martian domain, maintaining
the solar system's trade routes — the [Nazi faction's](/lore/nazi-faction/) migration off-world
made administrative fact. At the program's dark end stands the **Dark Fleet**, whose far-future
[Cyborg Commander](/lore/cyborg-commander/) speaks in his own session; at its violent end, the
[Beirut attack](/lore/lebanon-attack/) — a "side-operation" the sessions attribute to an SSP
particle-beam craft, the "TR-3 Astra."

The SSP is where the archive's [control era](/lore/the-chronicle/) becomes cosmology: the
suppressed [teleportation](/lore/teleportation/), [anti-gravity](/lore/anti-gravity/), and
[MedBed](/lore/medbed/) technologies all live inside it, and disclosure — the handover of that
inheritance — is what [first contact](/lore/first-contact/) is finally about.
